chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D687of 2017: Riaz Ahmed Kalhoro vs. Chairman U.C Abad & others For the Petitioner: Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 09.02.2022. Date of announcement: 09.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner claims to be employed by the respondents and claims unpaid salary with effect from April, 2017. The comments filed by the concerned respondents demonstrate that the documentation relied upon by the petitioner is fake and in such regard a copy of the outward register has also been placed on record. It is apparent that no vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court and even otherwise this matter is fraught with factual controversy, not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition is found to be without merit and is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105. 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
